paths.title: Complete Course
paths.description: All 14 lessons in the recommended order, from canonical red-green-refactor through empirical limits and open gaps.

paths.title: Practical Builder Path
paths.description: Focus on the daily engineering decisions that make Python TDD usable in real codebases with persistence and external boundaries.

paths.title: Integration and Boundary Path
paths.description: Prioritize isolation, boundary realism, seams, mocks, fakes, contracts, and broader coverage for service-heavy Python systems.

paths.title: Evidence-Aware Adoption Path
paths.description: Move from the canonical loop to adoption strategy with explicit attention to what the literature supports and where it remains thin.
